description_long: This house features a modern, Mediterranean-inspired design with a flat roof and multiple levels, surrounded by lush palm trees at the rear. The facade is predominantly white with large, rectangular windows and a central, prominent entryway. The rear of the house opens to a spacious terrace area, bordered by a curved yellow wall and lined with palm trees, suggesting an outdoor leisure space. The side elevations reveal a mix of open balconies, rooftop patios, and various window sizes, adding architectural interest and functional outdoor areas. The structure appears to be constructed mainly from concrete or stucco, with glass for the windows and metal railings on balconies. The overall layout is expansive, with a clear emphasis on both indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A large, white, modern Mediterranean-style house with flat roofs, expansive windows, and palm trees lining a curved rear terrace. The design features multiple balconies, rooftop patios, and a prominent central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical window arrangement, and a glimpse of the rooftop patio and palm trees in the background.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the house, side balconies, and the transition to the rear terrace with palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by a curved yellow wall, dense palm trees, and large windows opening onto the terrace.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying additional balconies, side windows, and the continuation of the terrace and palm tree landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and some grouped in rows
attribute_entryway_design: Central, prominent entryway with wide steps, large double doors, and minimal decorative elements
